[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0100000101 3
1 0001111010 5
2 0100011111 6
3 1101110101 7
4 1101010111 7
5 0011111011 7
6 0001000101 3
7 0000000101 2
